import pytest
from source import filter_expensive_items

def test_filter_expensive_items_with_string_prices():
    """Test that filter_expensive_items correctly handles string prices."""
    items = [
        {'name': 'item_a', 'price': 100},
        {'name': 'item_b', 'price': '200'},
        {'name': 'item_c', 'price': 50}
    ]
    
    result = filter_expensive_items(items, 150)
    
    assert result == [{'name': 'item_b', 'price': '200'}], "Should filter items with price > threshold, handling string prices"
